path: Problem: Calculate total area (Width×Height) for each category/material type from a variable-length list
Action: SUMPRODUCT with boolean criteria array multiplied by numeric arrays
Observation: SUMPRODUCT can apply a category filter and aggregate row-wise products without helper columns; works well for dynamic row counts when ranges are sized to the data
Problem: Make the source data range dynamic so the aggregation automatically includes new rows
Action: Convert the source range to an Excel Table and use structured references in SUMPRODUCT
Observation: Tables auto-expand and structured references keep formulas stable as rows are added/removed
Problem: Generate a unique list of material types to drive the summary output (so the summary adapts to new types)
Action: Use UNIQUE (or Power Query 'Remove Duplicates') to create the category list
Observation: A dynamic category list prevents manual maintenance and ensures the summary covers all present types
